subject: MAKABANSA
title: Napahahalagahan ang kasaysayan Singing Bee
objective: Napahahalagahan ang kasaysayan Singing Bee: An activity where learners sing songs of historical changes which took
introduction: Alam mo ba na ang bawat salitang binabasa mo ay may kapangyarihan? 📚 Ngayon: Napahahalagahan ang kasaysayan Singing Bee: An activity where learners sing song. Sama-sama tayong magbasa at matuto!
